summary.en: The principal seat of the Kingdom and the ceremonial center of national administration.
summary.nl: De hoofdzetel van het Koninkrijk en het ceremoniële centrum van het nationale bestuur.
summary.no: Kongedømmets hovedsete og det seremonielle sentrum for den nasjonale administrasjonen.
summary.it: La sede principale del Regno e il centro cerimoniale dell'amministrazione nazionale.

summary.en: A southern territorial division represented within the wider kingdom structure.
summary.nl: Een zuidelijke territoriale afdeling die vertegenwoordigd is binnen de bredere koninkrijksstructuur.
summary.no: En sørlig territoriell inndeling representert i den bredere kongedømmestrukturen.
summary.it: Una divisione territoriale meridionale rappresentata all'interno della più ampia struttura del regno.

summary.en: A northern territorial division forming part of the national framework of Melonia.
summary.nl: Een noordelijke territoriale afdeling die deel uitmaakt van het nationale kader van Melonia.
summary.no: En nordlig territoriell inndeling som utgjør en del av Melonias nasjonale rammeverk.
summary.it: Una divisione territoriale settentrionale che fa parte del quadro nazionale di Melonia.

ministries.name: Royal Household
ministries.title: Royal Household and Court Affairs
ministries.description: Maintains the ceremonial dignity, royal schedule, court protocol, and official household administration of the Crown.
ministries.focus: Ceremony, royal protocol, and state presentation.

ministries.name: Council Affairs
ministries.title: Council Affairs
ministries.description: Coordinates council procedure, official resolutions, ministerial continuity, and constitutional administration.

ministries.name: Foreign Affairs
ministries.title: Foreign Affairs and Diplomatic Relations
ministries.description: Oversees diplomatic correspondence, declarations, recognition matters, and official external communication.
ministries.focus: Diplomacy, public relations, and state correspondence.

ministries.name: Internal Affairs
ministries.title: Internal Affairs
ministries.description: Responsible for internal administration, territorial coordination, registry oversight, and domestic governance.

ministries.name: Citizenship and Civil Register
ministries.title: Citizenship and Civil Register
ministries.description: Maintains citizenship applications, civil entries, population records, and administrative verification workflows.
ministries.focus: Citizenship status and public civil records.

ministries.name: Passports and National Documentation
ministries.title: Passports and National Documentation
ministries.description: Handles public passport requests, document formats, issuance review, and identity documentation standards.
ministries.focus: Official documents, passports, and identity materials.

ministries.name: Culture and Ceremony
ministries.title: Culture and Ceremony
ministries.description: Preserves national symbolism, public traditions, ceremonial texts, and cultural representation of Melonia.
ministries.focus: National identity, tradition, and ceremonial life.

ministries.name: Territorial Administration
ministries.title: Territorial Administration
ministries.description: Supports structured administration across Melonia Main, Melonia South, and Melonia North.
ministries.focus: Territorial order and coordination between seats of the Kingdom.

ministries.name: Melonian Bureau of Investigation
ministries.title: Melonian Bureau of Investigation
ministries.description: Supports internal investigation, public record review, administrative integrity, and official state security inquiries within the lawful structure of the Kingdom.
ministries.focus: Investigation, administrative review, and national security matters.

news.title: The king is DEAD!?
news.summary:
After a announcement in the discord many people where wondering what happend to the king.
the king said that he was going to kill himself due to depression, yet he is still fine after a small brake.
so no one is harmed

news.title: Melonia has changed
news.summary: Melonia has changed its flag, and we have become an empire with a emperor

news.title: melonia left the IKN
news.summary: Melonia left the IKN after much changes in the IKN and the fact that we have become an empire, we have decided to leave the IKN and focus on our own country
